scripts.postgenerate:flutter: powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path lib/generated/api -Filter *.dart -Recurse | ForEach-Object { (Get-Content $_.FullName) -replace '//\s*@dart\s*=.*', '' | Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 $_.FullName }; $p = 'lib/generated/api/pubspec.yaml'; (Get-Content $p) -replace 'sdk:.*', 'sdk: ''>=3.10.8 <4.0.0''' | Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 $p" && cd lib/generated/api && dart pub get
scripts.build:flutter: cd lib/generated/api && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs && powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path . -Filter *.dart -Recurse | ForEach-Object { (Get-Content $_.FullName) -replace '//\s*@dart\s*=.*', '' | Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 $_.FullName }"
scripts.clean:flutter: flutter clean && powershell -Command "if (Test-Path lib/generated/api) { cd lib/generated/api; if (Test-Path .dart_tool) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .dart_tool }; cd ../../..; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force lib/generated/api }"
scripts.flutter:all: npm run clean:flutter && npm run generate:flutter && npm run postgenerate:flutter && npm run build:flutter
scripts.flutter:update-api: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path lib/generated/api) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force lib/generated/api }" && npm run generate:flutter && npm run postgenerate:flutter && npm run build:flutter
